name: Tiny Tales: Hidden Objects
short_description: Explore, observe, and find the differences. Each scene tells its own story! Tiny Tales: Hidden Objects is a relaxing game with 60 environments blending isometric and low poly 3D. Test your observational skills and be transported into the stories.
detailed_description:
Tiny Tales: Hidden Objects is inspired by traditional find-the-difference games, which are typically just static images. Tiny Tales brings this mechanic into a 3D environment where each scene tells a unique story.

Challenge your observation skills with three difficulty levels: (3, 5, and 7 different objects). You can choose the level of challenge you wish to face. Tiny Tales: Hidden Objects is a relaxing game with low poly graphics and 60 scenes to explore.

Hint System:

Make your search easier with intuitive suggestions that help you find the differences between objects.

Choose Your Music:

Customize your game experience by selecting from various soundtrack options, adjusting the atmosphere to your liking.

Tiny Stories:

Discover the story behind each scene as you find all the differences.

Game Features:

  • Hint System: Receive helpful suggestions to assist in finding hidden objects.
  • Choose Your Music: Customize the soundtrack with your favorite tracks for a personalized experience.
  • Relaxing Atmosphere: Enjoy environments and music that create a calm and tranquil atmosphere.
  • No Time Limits: Play at your own pace, without time pressures.
  • Tiny Stories: Explore immersive scenes that reveal fascinating stories.
  • 3D Environments: Experience detailed and engaging scenarios in a three-dimensional world.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
